page: Microsoft Azure D8nds_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dndv6 server family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and features an Intel processor with 8 dedicated vCPUs. The system is provisioned with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This virtual machine operates under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server type includes 472 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. The Dndv6 family is designated as network-optimized, providing enhanced networking capabilities for workloads requiring reliable throughput. No GPUs are included in this configuration, and it does not come with complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its balanced 1:4 CPU-to-memory ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, the D8nds_v6 is designed for general-purpose workloads, database hosting, and network-sensitive applications. The inclusion of local storage and Premium Storage compatibility makes it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that require fast local scratch space or persistent database storage without needing to provision separate external storage resources.
description: The Microsoft Azure D8nds_v6 is a general-purpose, network-optimized virtual machine from the Dndv6 family, powered by an Intel processor with an x86_64 architecture. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs and 32.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance includes 472 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations. With no integrated GPUs and zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses, the D8nds_v6 is designed for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources alongside local disk space. Its balanced resource allocation and network-optimized design make it highly suitable for database hosting, web serving, and general-purpose enterprise applications that benefit from fast local storage and consistent network performance.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D8nds_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 8 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 472 GB of local storage, optimized for general-purpose and network-intensive workloads.

tagline: A network-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated compute cores, balanced memory allocation, and fast local storage for general-purpose enterprise workloads.
